---
name: Prompt Request
about: Request a new prompt for the pack
title: '[REQUEST] '
labels: prompt-request
assignees: ''
---

**What should this prompt build?**
Describe in plain English what code you want generated.

**Which category?**
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Integration

**Which framework or technology?**
e.g. React, Vue, Django, Laravel, Go

**Why would this be useful to others?**
One sentence on who else would use this.

---
*Top requested prompts get added to the next pack update.*
*Get the current pack: https://chainapi.gumroad.com*
